relationship_to_restored_text: Interpretive contemplative layer aligned by verse. This does not replace the source-audited restored translation.

verses.mystical_translation: The Divine has always spoken in many ways through the prophets.
Now the speech gathers in the Son, heir of all and maker of the ages.
The Son shines as radiance of glory, imprint of Divine reality, bearing all by powerful word.
His inherited name rises beyond the messengers.
Scripture names him Son in a way no messenger receives.
The firstborn is brought into the inhabited world and worshiped.
The Son's throne is age-long, ruled by straightness.
Love of justice brings anointing of gladness.
The Lord founded earth and heavens.
Created things age, but the Son remains.
All may be changed like garments, but he is the same.
The enthroned one waits until opposition is placed beneath his feet.

contemplative_note: Hebrews 1 is luminous speech: prophecy becomes radiance, radiance becomes Son, and the Son bears all things while serving spirits gather around the heirs of healing.
